visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a large warehouse retail environment, likely a Costco. In the foreground, a large graphic overlay features a cartoon character and bold text. Shoppers in casual attire are seen in the blurred background, pushing metal carts through wide aisles under bright industrial lighting. (2) The scene cuts to a stack of purple and white Kleenex toilet paper packages on a pallet. Large yellow and white text overlays the center of the frame, detailing price reductions. (3) A close-up shot shows boxes of Kirkland brand Salted Mixed Nuts. The packaging is visible through the clear bags, and price text overlays the image. (4) The camera focuses on boxes of XIMAI milk puffs, neatly stacked. The packaging features illustrations of the product and blue accents. (5) Multiple pink boxes of Japanese-style rice crackers are displayed. The background shows more warehouse shelves and other products. (6) A hand reaches in to adjust a package of Iberico pork slices in a refrigerated section. The meat is thinly sliced and visible through clear plastic wrap. (7) Boxes of Lay's family fun mix potato chips are stacked high. The boxes are vibrant pink with images of various chip bags. (8) The camera pans across boxes of spicy V-shaped crackers. The packaging is red and black with flame graphics. (9) Rows of Quaker organic oat milk bottles are visible. The bottles have yellow caps and characteristic Quaker branding. (10) Boxes of Minions-themed fruit gummy snacks are shown. The packaging is bright yellow with various Minion characters. (11) Packages of quinoa soda crackers are stacked. The packaging is beige and green. (12) Frozen seafood packages, specifically squid/cuttlefish cutlets, are seen in a freezer chest. (13) Multiple bottles of Lion King antibacterial hand soap are displayed in their cardboard shipping boxes. (14) Red boxes containing mini Pringles cans are stacked. The iconic Pringles mascot is visible on the packaging. (15) Kinder Maxi chocolate bars in red and white boxes are shown on a shelf. (16) Bags of I-Mei apple slices are displayed. The packaging is yellow with a red apple graphic. (17) Boxes of butterfly-shaped cookies are seen behind glass in a bakery section. (18) Bags of red Fuji apples are shown in cardboard crates. (19) Packages of Japanese-style baumkuchen cakes are displayed in red boxes. (20) Multiple bottles of organic kombucha tea are seen in their boxes. (21) Large packs of bottled green tea are stacked. The bottles are yellow with green labels. (22) Blue packages of truffled chicken breast are shown. (23) Bags of black olive cheese bread are seen through clear plastic. (24) Boxes of mini maple pecan pastries are displayed. (25) Boxes of Wu-Mu brand nutritious noodles are stacked. (26) Boxes of Nescafe Gold coffee are shown. (27) Bottles of sugar-free corn tea are displayed. (28) Packages of Korean-style glass noodles and rice are shown. (29) Large stacks of malt drink cans are visible. (30) Boxes of apple vinegar are shown. (31) Stacks of Vitali soda cans are displayed. (32) Boxes of Always liquid sanitary pads are shown. (33) Boxes of Alphamic baking paper are seen. (34) Containers of Musang King durian ice cream are shown. (35) Boxes of Gold micro-grind coffee are displayed. (36) Mountain Dew soda cans are stacked in large quantities. (37) Bowls of instant noodles with cheese flavor are seen. (38) Bottles of Mizkan citrus sauce are shown. (39) Packs of Ito En apple black tea are displayed. (40) Bottles of CUNE red wine are shown on a shelf. (41) Bottles of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Honey whiskey are displayed. (42) Bottles of Capetta Moscato white wine are shown. (43) Large stacks of red Budweiser beer boxes are visible.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator visible in background at the start, several shoppers in the background aisles throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The narrator is not explicitly shown as a character, but hands are visible touching products; background shoppers wear casual everyday clothing.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large warehouse-style store with high ceilings, industrial lighting, and massive metal shelving units stacked with pallets of consumer goods.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-energy, fast-paced male narrator introducing the Costco weekly specials. The background music is an upbeat, electronic pop track with a strong, driving four-on-the-floor beat and bright synthesizer stabs. The narrator's speech rate is exceptionally high, delivering product names and prices with clear articulation and enthusiastic intonation. (2) As the video cuts between products, the narrator maintains a relentless pace, listing each item and its discounted price. Every few seconds, a soft 'ding' or digital interface sound effect emphasizes the transition or the price reveal. The music continues unabated, providing a constant energetic layer beneath the rapid-fire narration. (3) Towards the end of the video, the narrator lists several alcoholic beverages, including wines and whiskey, with the same high arousal and professional tone. The spectral brightness of the track is high, typical of social media marketing content. The audio ends abruptly on the final product, maintaining high momentum until the very last second.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a rapid-fire overview of current weekly discounts at Costco Taiwan (July 28th to August 3rd) to encourage shoppers to visit the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is entirely focused on promoting specific products and prices at a named retailer (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a classic 'value-driven' social media advertisement. Its effectiveness relies on the high information density and the perceived urgency of limited-time discounts.
